facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 6,351 reviews. Radisson Blu Resort, Phú Quốc is not an accident.

Private beach on Bãi Dài. Outdoor pool. Three bars. A restaurant that doesn't rush you. This is the kind of resort where you lose track of what day it is.

If you're splitting one splurge across your Phu Quoc trip, this is the one to pick. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Bãi Dài private beach, three bars, a pool with no crowds. Radisson Blu Resort, Phú Quốc earns every one of its 6,351 reviews. Tag your travel buddy.
